strategy.name: ETF Mean Reversion + Trend Following
strategy.description: Combines RSI oversold/overbought with EMA trend confirmation and MACD momentum. Designed for daily ETF trading targeting small consistent gains.

long.description: Price above 50 EMA — uptrend intact, not catching a falling knife
MACD histogram positive — momentum turning bullish
Price above lower Bollinger Band — not in free-fall

entry_rules.note: Score = sum of weights for matched conditions. Must reach min_score to trigger.

exit_rules.description: Price dropped below 50 EMA — trend broken, cut losses
MACD histogram turned negative — momentum fading

exit_note: Exit when ANY exit condition is met (OR logic).

risk_rules.note: 2% stop loss, 3% take profit = 1.5:1 reward/risk ratio
